title: 1 Week Camp Experience
excerpt: CBM Experience (Campers in rising 2rd & 3rd grades) CBMX Aleph: Sunday, June 7 to Friday, June 12 (6 days) CBMX Bet: Sunday, June 14 to Friday, June 19 (6 days) CBMX Gimel: Sunday, June 21 to Friday, June 26 (6 days) CBMX Zayin: Sunday, July 19 to Friday, July 24 (6 days) CBM Experience […]
contentHtml:
CBM Experience (Campers in rising 2rd & 3rd grades)

CBMX Aleph: Sunday, June 7 to Friday, June 12 (6 days)
CBMX Bet: Sunday, June 14 to Friday, June 19 (6 days)
CBMX Gimel: Sunday, June 21 to Friday, June 26 (6 days)
CBMX Zayin: Sunday, July 19 to Friday, July 24 (6 days)

CBM Experience gives younger campers the perfect taste of Camp Barney. Campers arrive at Camp Barney on Sunday for an amazing six-day, five-night adventure. Campers are immersed in the CBM community, participating in tons of cool activities like tubing, getting to know our horses, sports, arts and crafts, and improv!  They will also share the CBM experience of sleeping in bunks, going on a cookout in the woods, and even getting canteen and mail! Registration for CBM Experience runs concurrently with registration for all other Camp Barney programs.
contentText:
CBM Experience (Campers in rising 2rd & 3rd grades)

CBMX Aleph:
 Sunday, June 7 to Friday, June 12 (6 days)

CBMX Bet:
 Sunday, June 14 to Friday, June 19 (6 days)

CBMX Gimel:
 Sunday, June 21 to Friday, June 26 (6 days)

CBMX Zayin:
 Sunday,  July 19 to Friday, July 24 (6 days)

CBM Experience gives younger campers the perfect taste of Camp Barney. Campers arrive at Camp Barney on Sunday for an amazing six-day, five-night adventure. Campers are immersed in the CBM community, participating in tons of cool activities like tubing, getting to know our horses, sports, arts and crafts, and improv!  They will also share the CBM experience of sleeping in bunks, going on a cookout in the woods, and even getting canteen and mail! Registration for CBM Experience runs concurrently with registration for all other Camp Barney programs.
